course_title: SURGICAL AND PROCEDURAL CARE EDUCATION TEACHING ELECTIVE
description: Learn effective methods of teaching procedural skills and of small group case-based learning (CBL) facilitation. Demonstrate effective teaching strategies when instructing more junior medical students in in-person procedural skills (e.g., suturing, knot-tying, ultrasound/doppler, intubation) and facilitating virtual CBL learning. Bolster mastery in surgical and procedural education.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MED SC-M 810,811,812, and813and declared in Doctor of Medicine with fourth-year standing
